faqs.question: How much does cricket control cost in Rutherford, NJ?
faqs.answer: Cricket control services in Rutherford typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment methods required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, ensuring transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: What types of crickets are common in Rutherford?
faqs.answer: Rutherford properties most commonly experience house crickets, field crickets, and camel crickets. House crickets are attracted to warmth and often enter homes through cracks and gaps, while camel crickets prefer damp basements and crawl spaces common in older Rutherford homes. Our technicians identify the specific species to apply the most effective treatment.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation in Rutherford?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations in Rutherford homes can be eliminated within 1-2 treatments. Initial treatment typically provides immediate relief, with crickets noticeably reduced within 24-48 hours. We offer same-day and next-day service appointments and include follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination and prevent future infestations.

faqs.question: Are your cricket control treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we prioritize the safety of your family and pets by using EPA-approved products and offering eco-friendly treatment options. Our technicians are trained in safe application methods and will provide specific guidelines for re-entry times if needed. We can also customize treatments for homes with specific health concerns or sensitivities.
